title: malus dioeca
intro: Malus dioica, also known as the Himalayan crab apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Malus dioica include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Malus dioica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
